title: ENS Resolver
description: Resolve ENS names to wallet addresses and reverse-lookup wallet addresses to ENS names — powered by GoldRush's getResolvedAddress endpoint on Ethereum mainnet.
useCase: Add ENS name support to any wallet input — resolve 'vitalik.eth' to its 0x address before querying balances or transactions, and show ENS names alongside addresses in your UI.

keyParams.chainName: Must be eth-mainnet for ENS resolution
keyParams.walletAddress: ENS name (e.g. vitalik.eth) or 0x address for reverse lookup
